jsonld.name: Interpretive Debt
jsonld.description: The accumulated cognitive cost of performing charitable interpretation across repeated incoherent inputs from the same person, experienced as growing effort to maintain generosity as pattern-matching reveals their confusion is structural rather than incidental.
